creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
On Sat, Jun 23, 2012 at 4:59 AM, Michael Scheidell
<michael.scheidell@secnap.com> wrote:
> ping:
>
> should I commit this?
> won't build on pointyhat either for 7.4, i386
>
> <http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=&portname=fcitx>
>
> any possibility its related to this?
> (remember, i386 is 32bit, amd64 is 64 bit. maybe patches are wrong?

It was. If *linep == NULL, no need to see *linecapp in practice. I
implemented getline literally based on getline(3), but the doc does
not cover this.

The new patch is attached.

>
> .if ${OSVERSION} < 800067
> # getline() is GNU extension which FreeBSD only recently adopted
> EXTRA_PATCHES+= ${FILESDIR}/getline-src_lib_fcitx-utils_utils.c \
> ${FILESDIR}/getline-src_lib_fcitx-utils_utils.h
> .endif
>
> (tried devel/libgetline, didn't work, would not link)
>
